title: Crispy Carrot Fries + Sriracha Mayo
description: Oven-baked carrot fries coated in parmesan and seasonings until crispy, served with a sauce of choice.

items: 1 lb carrots, peeled and cut into uniform fry shape
Optional: parsley for garnish, sauce of choice for dipping

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, add the olive oil, parmesan, cornstarch, onion powder, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Mix well to combine.
Add in the carrots and toss to coat, until all carrots are well coated.
Spread the carrots evenly on the lined baking sheet. It's very important that they're spread in a single layer and not overlapping to allow them to get crispy.
Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, flipping the carrots halfway.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve with a dipping sauce of choice (ketchup, ranch, pesto, or spicy mayo are recommended).
